title: Lazy Lemon Bliss
description: An earthy and juicy Spanish dish featuring lemons in a sweet yet healthy twist, perfect for lazy Sundays with no added sugars.
instructions: Combine lemon juice, lemon zest, honey (if using), and vanilla extract in a mixing bowl.
Add almond flour to the mixture and mix well until no lumps remain.
Fold in coconut cream and shredded coconut gently with a spatula.
If using chocolate chips, fold them into the batter just before serving.
Pour the batter evenly into a prepared baking dish or individual ramekins.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 minutes or until golden brown and set.
Allow to cool slightly before serving. Enjoy your refreshing and healthy dessert!
